reviews.comment:
Un lugar para consumir de paso. Los precios son elevados.

(Translated by Google)
A place to grab a bite while you're on the go. Prices are high.

reviews.comment:
Uno de los peores ACAs del país. No tiene la aplicación de YPF. Los baños sucios y a la 7am no tiene medialunas ni nada de pastelería.  Unos km más y encontras mejores opciones. NO PARAR AHI

(Translated by Google)
One of the worst ACAs in the country. It doesn't have the YPF app. The bathrooms are dirty, and at 7 a.m. they don't have croissants or any pastries. A few more kilometers and you'll find better options. DON'T STOP THERE.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNodGRLdFNBEAE
